option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<Window x:Class="Paperhome.Views.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:iconPacks="http://metro.mahapps.com/winfx/xaml/iconpacks" Title="Paperwork" Height="700" Width="1150" WindowStyle="None" ResizeMode="NoResize" WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen" Background="#181818" TextElement.FontFamily="pack://application:,,,/Fonts/#Terminus (TTF)" TextOptions.TextFormattingMode="Display">
<Window.Resources> <LinearGradientBrush x:Key="SteppedDeskGradient" StartPoint="0,0" EndPoint="0,1"> <GradientStop Color="#2A2A2B" Offset="0.0" /> <GradientStop Color="#2A2A2B" Offset="0.2" /> <GradientStop Color="#252526" Offset="0.2" /> <GradientStop Color="#252526" Offset="0.5" /> <GradientStop Color="#202021" Offset="0.5" /> <GradientStop Color="#202021" Offset="0.8" /> <GradientStop Color="#1C1C1D" Offset="0.8" /> <GradientStop Color="#1C1C1D" Offset="1.0" /> </LinearGradientBrush>
<LinearGradientBrush x:Key="DetailedFolderGradient" StartPoint="0,0" EndPoint="0,1"> <GradientStop Color="#DCA73F" Offset="0.0" /> <GradientStop Color="#DCA73F" Offset="0.1" /> <GradientStop Color="#D39F38" Offset="0.1" /> <GradientStop Color="#D39F38" Offset="0.2" /> <GradientStop Color="#CA9731" Offset="0.2" /> <GradientStop Color="#CA9731" Offset="0.4" /> <GradientStop Color="#C18F2A" Offset="0.4" /> <GradientStop Color="#C18F2A" Offset="0.6" /> <GradientStop Color="#B88723" Offset="0.6" /> <GradientStop Color="#B88723" Offset="0.8" /> <GradientStop Color="#AF7F1C" Offset="0.8" /> <GradientStop Color="#AF7F1C" Offset="1.0" /> </LinearGradientBrush>
<Style x:Key="MechanicalButton" TargetType="Button"> <Setter Property="Background" Value="#A0A0A0"/> <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#111111"/> <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#222222"/> <Setter Property="Padding" Value="10,6"/> <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/> <Setter Property="SnapsToDevicePixels" Value="True"/> <Setter Property="RenderOptions.EdgeMode" Value="Aliased"/> <Setter Property="Template"> <Setter.Value> <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button"> <Border Background="#333333" Padding="2" CornerRadius="0" SnapsToDevicePixels="True"> <Border x:Name="ButtonFace" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="2,2,2,6" CornerRadius="0" SnapsToDevicePixels="True"> <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="{TemplateBinding Padding}"/> </Border> </Border> <ControlTemplate.Triggers> <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True"> <Setter TargetName="ButtonFace" Property="BorderThickness" Value="2,2,2,2"/> <Setter TargetName="ButtonFace" Property="Margin" Value="0,4,0,0"/> <Setter TargetName="ButtonFace" Property="Background" Value="#8A8A8A"/> </Trigger> <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True"> <Setter TargetName="ButtonFace" Property="Background" Value="#B4B4B4"/> </Trigger> </ControlTemplate.Triggers> </ControlTemplate> </Setter.Value> </Setter> </Style>
<Style x:Key="PixelBox" TargetType="ContentControl"> <Setter Property="SnapsToDevicePixels" Value="True"/> <Setter Property="RenderOptions.EdgeMode" Value="Aliased"/> <Setter Property="HorizontalContentAlignment" Value="Center"/> <Setter Property="VerticalContentAlignment" Value="Center"/> <Setter Property="Template"> <Setter.Value> <ControlTemplate TargetType="ContentControl"> <Grid> <Border Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" Margin="2,0" SnapsToDevicePixels="True"/> <Border Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" Margin="0,2" SnapsToDevicePixels="True"/> <Border BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="0,2" Margin="2,0" SnapsToDevicePixels="True"/> <Border BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="2,0" Margin="0,2" SnapsToDevicePixels="True"/>
<ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="{TemplateBinding HorizontalContentAlignment}" VerticalAlignment="{TemplateBinding VerticalContentAlignment}" Margin="{TemplateBinding Padding}"/> </Grid> </ControlTemplate> </Setter.Value> </Setter> </Style> </Window.Resources>
<Border CornerRadius="8" Background="#181818" ClipToBounds="True"> <Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="30" /> <RowDefinition Height="50" /> <RowDefinition Height="*" /> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<Grid Grid.Row="0" Background="#181818" MouseDown="TitleBar_MouseDown"> <TextBlock Text="Paperhome" Foreground="#888888" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="15,0,0,0" FontWeight="Bold" />
<StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right"> <Button Width="40" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" Foreground="#888888" Click="Minimize_Click"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Minus" Width="12" Height="12"/> </Button> <Button Width="40" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" Foreground="#888888" Click="Close_Click"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Close" Width="12" Height="12"/> </Button> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Grid.Row="1" Background="#222222" Margin="0,0,0,0"> <StackPanel.Effect> <DropShadowEffect BlurRadius="0" ShadowDepth="4" Direction="270" Opacity="0.5" Color="Black"/> </StackPanel.Effect>
<Button Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}" Margin="15,6,5,6"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Plus" Width="14" Height="14" Margin="0,0,8,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> <TextBlock Text="ДОБАВИТЬ" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> </StackPanel> </Button>
<Button Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}" Margin="5,6,5,6"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Delete" Width="14" Height="14" Margin="0,0,8,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> <TextBlock Text="УДАЛИТЬ" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> </StackPanel> </Button>
<Button Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}" Margin="5,6,5,6"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Sliders" Width="14" Height="14" Margin="0,0,8,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> <TextBlock Text="ПАРАМЕТРЫ" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> </StackPanel> </Button> </StackPanel>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" Background="{StaticResource SteppedDeskGradient}"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="320" /> <ColumnDefinition Width="15" /> <ColumnDefinition Width="*" /> <ColumnDefinition Width="15" /> <ColumnDefinition Width="380" /> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<Grid Grid.Column="0" Margin="15,15,0,15"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="28"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#CA9731" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="2,2,2,0" HorizontalAlignment="Left" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <TextBlock Text="ХРАНИЛИЩЕ" Foreground="#FFFFFF" FontWeight="Bold" Padding="15,4" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/> </Border>
<Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#CA9731" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="2,2,2,0" Margin="0,0,15,0" HorizontalAlignment="Right" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <TextBlock Text="" Foreground="#FFFFFF" FontWeight="Bold" Padding="15,4" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/> </Border>
<Border Grid.Row="1" Background="{StaticResource DetailedFolderGradient}" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="2" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased"> <Border.Effect> <DropShadowEffect BlurRadius="0" ShadowDepth="4" Direction="315" Opacity="0.4" Color="Black"/> </Border.Effect> <TextBlock Text="[ДЕРЕВО ФАЙЛОВ]" Foreground="#333" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> </Border> </Grid>
<Grid Grid.Column="2" Margin="0,15,0,15"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="28"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#1F1F1F" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="2,2,2,0" HorizontalAlignment="Left" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <TextBlock Text="ИНСПЕКТОР" Foreground="#888" FontWeight="Bold" Padding="15,4" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/> </Border>
<Border Grid.Row="1" Background="#1F1F1F" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="2" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <Border.Effect> <DropShadowEffect BlurRadius="0" ShadowDepth="2" Direction="315" Opacity="0.3" Color="Black"/> </Border.Effect>
<Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="45"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="20"/> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Background="#2A2A2A" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="0,0,0,2" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <Border Background="#111" BorderBrush="#333" BorderThickness="2" Padding="10,2" Margin="0,0,15,0" Height="25" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <TextBlock Text="СТРАНИЦА: 01 / 12" Foreground="#DCA73F" VerticalAlignment="Center" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True" TextOptions.TextFormattingMode="Display" TextOptions.TextRenderingMode="Aliased" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased"/> </Border>
<Button Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}" Margin="5,0" Padding="8,4" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="ZoomOut" Width="12" Height="12" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="NearestNeighbor"/> </Button> <Button Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}" Margin="5,0" Padding="8,4" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Scale" Width="12" Height="12" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="NearestNeighbor"/> </Button> <Button Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}" Margin="5,0,15,0" Padding="8,4" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="ZoomIn" Width="12" Height="12" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="NearestNeighbor"/> </Button> </StackPanel> </Border>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Text="[ВЫВОД ДОКУМЕНТА]" Foreground="#555" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
<Border Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" Background="#222" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="2,0,0,0"> <Grid> <Button Background="#444" Foreground="#111" Content="▲" Height="20" VerticalAlignment="Top" BorderThickness="1" BorderBrush="#111" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased"/> <Border Background="#888" Margin="2,25,2,0" Height="60" VerticalAlignment="Top" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="1,1,1,3"/> <Button Background="#444" Foreground="#111" Content="▼" Height="20" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" BorderThickness="1" BorderBrush="#111" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased"/> </Grid> </Border> </Grid> </Border> </Grid>
<ContentControl Grid.Column="4" Style="{StaticResource PixelBox}" Background="#222222" BorderBrush="#111" Margin="0,15,15,15"> <ContentControl.Effect> <DropShadowEffect BlurRadius="0" ShadowDepth="6" Direction="315" Opacity="0.5" Color="Black"/> </ContentControl.Effect> <TextBlock Text="[ЗОНА МЕТАДАННЫХ И ИИ]" Foreground="#666"/> </ContentControl> </Grid> </Grid> </Border> </Window>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<Window x:Class="Paperhome.Views.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:iconPacks="http://metro.mahapps.com/winfx/xaml/iconpacks" Title="Paperwork" Height="700" Width="1150" WindowStyle="None" ResizeMode="NoResize" WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen" Background="#181818" TextElement.FontFamily="pack://application:,,,/Fonts/#Terminus (TTF)" TextOptions.TextFormattingMode="Display">
<Window.Resources> <LinearGradientBrush x:Key="SteppedDeskGradient" StartPoint="0,0" EndPoint="0,1"> <GradientStop Color="#2A2A2B" Offset="0.0" /> <GradientStop Color="#2A2A2B" Offset="0.2" /> <GradientStop Color="#252526" Offset="0.2" /> <GradientStop Color="#252526" Offset="0.5" /> <GradientStop Color="#202021" Offset="0.5" /> <GradientStop Color="#202021" Offset="0.8" /> <GradientStop Color="#1C1C1D" Offset="0.8" /> <GradientStop Color="#1C1C1D" Offset="1.0" /> </LinearGradientBrush>
<LinearGradientBrush x:Key="DetailedFolderGradient" StartPoint="0,0" EndPoint="0,1"> <GradientStop Color="#DCA73F" Offset="0.0" /> <GradientStop Color="#DCA73F" Offset="0.1" /> <GradientStop Color="#D39F38" Offset="0.1" /> <GradientStop Color="#D39F38" Offset="0.2" /> <GradientStop Color="#CA9731" Offset="0.2" /> <GradientStop Color="#CA9731" Offset="0.4" /> <GradientStop Color="#C18F2A" Offset="0.4" /> <GradientStop Color="#C18F2A" Offset="0.6" /> <GradientStop Color="#B88723" Offset="0.6" /> <GradientStop Color="#B88723" Offset="0.8" /> <GradientStop Color="#AF7F1C" Offset="0.8" /> <GradientStop Color="#AF7F1C" Offset="1.0" /> </LinearGradientBrush>
<Style x:Key="MechanicalButton" TargetType="Button"> <Setter Property="Background" Value="#A0A0A0"/> <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#111111"/> <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#222222"/> <Setter Property="Padding" Value="10,6"/> <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/> <Setter Property="SnapsToDevicePixels" Value="True"/> <Setter Property="RenderOptions.EdgeMode" Value="Aliased"/> <Setter Property="Template"> <Setter.Value> <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button"> <Border Background="#333333" Padding="2" CornerRadius="0" SnapsToDevicePixels="True"> <Border x:Name="ButtonFace" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="2,2,2,6" CornerRadius="0" SnapsToDevicePixels="True"> <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="{TemplateBinding Padding}"/> </Border> </Border> <ControlTemplate.Triggers> <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True"> <Setter TargetName="ButtonFace" Property="BorderThickness" Value="2,2,2,2"/> <Setter TargetName="ButtonFace" Property="Margin" Value="0,4,0,0"/> <Setter TargetName="ButtonFace" Property="Background" Value="#8A8A8A"/> </Trigger> <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True"> <Setter TargetName="ButtonFace" Property="Background" Value="#B4B4B4"/> </Trigger> </ControlTemplate.Triggers> </ControlTemplate> </Setter.Value> </Setter> </Style>
<Style x:Key="PixelBox" TargetType="ContentControl"> <Setter Property="SnapsToDevicePixels" Value="True"/> <Setter Property="RenderOptions.EdgeMode" Value="Aliased"/> <Setter Property="HorizontalContentAlignment" Value="Center"/> <Setter Property="VerticalContentAlignment" Value="Center"/> <Setter Property="Template"> <Setter.Value> <ControlTemplate TargetType="ContentControl"> <Grid> <Border Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" Margin="2,0" SnapsToDevicePixels="True"/> <Border Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" Margin="0,2" SnapsToDevicePixels="True"/> <Border BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="0,2" Margin="2,0" SnapsToDevicePixels="True"/> <Border BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="2,0" Margin="0,2" SnapsToDevicePixels="True"/>
<ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="{TemplateBinding HorizontalContentAlignment}" VerticalAlignment="{TemplateBinding VerticalContentAlignment}" Margin="{TemplateBinding Padding}"/> </Grid> </ControlTemplate> </Setter.Value> </Setter> </Style> </Window.Resources>
<Border CornerRadius="8" Background="#181818" ClipToBounds="True"> <Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="30" /> <RowDefinition Height="50" /> <RowDefinition Height="*" /> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<Grid Grid.Row="0" Background="#181818" MouseDown="TitleBar_MouseDown"> <TextBlock Text="Paperhome" Foreground="#888888" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="15,0,0,0" FontWeight="Bold" />
<StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right"> <Button Width="40" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" Foreground="#888888" Click="Minimize_Click"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Minus" Width="12" Height="12"/> </Button> <Button Width="40" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" Foreground="#888888" Click="Close_Click"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Close" Width="12" Height="12"/> </Button> </StackPanel> </Grid>
<StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Grid.Row="1" Background="#222222" Margin="0,0,0,0"> <StackPanel.Effect> <DropShadowEffect BlurRadius="0" ShadowDepth="4" Direction="270" Opacity="0.5" Color="Black"/> </StackPanel.Effect>
<Button Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}" Margin="15,6,5,6"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Plus" Width="14" Height="14" Margin="0,0,8,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> <TextBlock Text="ДОБАВИТЬ" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> </StackPanel> </Button>
<Button Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}" Margin="5,6,5,6"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Delete" Width="14" Height="14" Margin="0,0,8,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> <TextBlock Text="УДАЛИТЬ" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> </StackPanel> </Button>
<Button Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}" Margin="5,6,5,6"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Sliders" Width="14" Height="14" Margin="0,0,8,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> <TextBlock Text="ПАРАМЕТРЫ" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> </StackPanel> </Button> </StackPanel>
<Grid Grid.Row="2" Background="{StaticResource SteppedDeskGradient}"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="320" /> <ColumnDefinition Width="15" /> <ColumnDefinition Width="*" /> <ColumnDefinition Width="15" /> <ColumnDefinition Width="380" /> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<Grid Grid.Column="0" Margin="15,15,0,15"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="28"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#CA9731" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="2,2,2,0" HorizontalAlignment="Left" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <TextBlock Text="ХРАНИЛИЩЕ" Foreground="#FFFFFF" FontWeight="Bold" Padding="15,4" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/> </Border>
<Button Grid.Row="0" Margin="0,0,15,0" HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" Background="#E6CFA1" BorderBrush="#111" Padding="6" Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Search" Width="14" Height="14" Foreground="#111" /> </Button>
<Border Grid.Row="1" Background="{StaticResource DetailedFolderGradient}" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="2" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased"> <Border.Effect> <DropShadowEffect BlurRadius="0" ShadowDepth="4" Direction="315" Opacity="0.4" Color="Black"/> </Border.Effect> <TextBlock Text="[ДЕРЕВО ФАЙЛОВ]" Foreground="#333" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> </Border> </Grid>
<Grid Grid.Column="2" Margin="0,15,0,15"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="28"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#1F1F1F" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="2,2,2,0" HorizontalAlignment="Left" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <TextBlock Text="ИНСПЕКТОР" Foreground="#888" FontWeight="Bold" Padding="15,4" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/> </Border>
<Border Grid.Row="1" Background="#1F1F1F" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="2" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <Border.Effect> <DropShadowEffect BlurRadius="0" ShadowDepth="2" Direction="315" Opacity="0.3" Color="Black"/> </Border.Effect>
<Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="45"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="20"/> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Background="#2A2A2A" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="0,0,0,2" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <Border Background="#111" BorderBrush="#333" BorderThickness="2" Padding="10,2" Margin="0,0,15,0" Height="25" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <TextBlock Text="СТРАНИЦА: 01 / 12" Foreground="#DCA73F" VerticalAlignment="Center" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True" TextOptions.TextFormattingMode="Display" TextOptions.TextRenderingMode="Aliased" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased"/> </Border>
<Button Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}" Margin="5,0" Padding="8,4" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="ZoomOut" Width="12" Height="12" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="NearestNeighbor"/> </Button> <Button Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}" Margin="5,0" Padding="8,4" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="Scale" Width="12" Height="12" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="NearestNeighbor"/> </Button> <Button Style="{StaticResource MechanicalButton}" Margin="5,0,15,0" Padding="8,4" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True"> <iconPacks:PackIconPixelartIcons Kind="ZoomIn" Width="12" Height="12" SnapsToDevicePixels="True" UseLayoutRounding="True" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased" RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="NearestNeighbor"/> </Button> </StackPanel> </Border>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Text="[ВЫВОД ДОКУМЕНТА]" Foreground="#555" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
<Border Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" Background="#222" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="2,0,0,0"> <Grid> <Button Background="#444" Foreground="#111" Content="▲" Height="20" VerticalAlignment="Top" BorderThickness="1" BorderBrush="#111" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased"/> <Border Background="#888" Margin="2,25,2,0" Height="60" VerticalAlignment="Top" BorderBrush="#111" BorderThickness="1,1,1,3"/> <Button Background="#444" Foreground="#111" Content="▼" Height="20" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" BorderThickness="1" BorderBrush="#111" RenderOptions.EdgeMode="Aliased"/> </Grid> </Border> </Grid> </Border> </Grid>
<ContentControl Grid.Column="4" Style="{StaticResource PixelBox}" Background="#222222" BorderBrush="#111" Margin="0,15,15,15"> <ContentControl.Effect> <DropShadowEffect BlurRadius="0" ShadowDepth="6" Direction="315" Opacity="0.5" Color="Black"/> </ContentControl.Effect> <TextBlock Text="[ЗОНА МЕТАДАННЫХ И ИИ]" Foreground="#666"/> </ContentControl> </Grid> </Grid> </Border> </Window>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
